ocr.text: In the first quarter of 2024, Veolia Environnement reported a Total Revenue of $120.5M, reflecting a Year-over-Year Change of
5.4% and a Market Share of 30.1% in North America, with a Treatment Type classified as Biological and an Efficiency of
92.5%. The Operating Costs for this period amounted to $75.3M, representing a Year-over-Year Change of 2.1%, and a Market
Share of 20.4% in North America, utilizing a Chemical Treatment Type with an Efficiency of 87.8%. The Net Profit recorded
was $45.2M, showing a Year-over-Year Change of 7.8% and a Market Share of 15.3% in North America, associated with a
Physical Treatment Type and an Efficiency of 90.1%.
Metric  Amount($M)  YoYChange(%)  MarketShare(%)  Region  TreatmentType  Efficiency(%)
TotalRevenue  $120.5M  5.4  30.1  NorthAmerica  Biological  92.5
OperatingCosts  $75.3M  2.1  20.4  NorthAmerica  Chemical  87.8
NetProfit  $45.2M  7.8  15.3  NorthAmerica  Physical  90.1
WasteProcessed  $300.0M  4.5  50.2  NorthAmerica  Total  90.0
CustomerSatisfaction  89.5%  1.2  N/A  NorthAmerica  N/A  Total
The total Waste Processed reached $300.0M, marking a Year-over-Year Change of 4.5% and a Market Share of 50.2% in North
America, categorized under Total Treatment Type with an Efficiency of 90.0%. Customer Satisfaction stood at 89.5%,
indicating a Year-over-Year Change of 1.2%, with no specific Market Share applicable in North America for this metric,
classified as N/A for Treatment Type and also as Total. This comprehensive overview of wastewater treatment metrics
underscores Veolia's operational performance across various dimensions, reflecting robust financial health and effective service
delivery in the environmental services and waste management sector. The strategic focus on enhancing efficiency and customer
satisfaction continues to drive growth, with particular attention to regional market dynamics and treatment methodologies
employed in North America.
